description: Pre-registered experiment set, frozen BEFORE any bandit code exists (docs/CLAUDE.md Amendment 3). Regimes span difficulty deliberately: grid size, relocation distance, probe bluntness, and shift frequency all vary so that a 'heuristic matches arbiter' verdict is a finding about arbitration rather than about an easy toy. May not be revised after the first bandit run.

alternate_prices.note: claude-haiku-4-5 table; Design decision 1 sensitivity check for the writeup

amendment_note: 2026-07-14: (Amendment 5) ucb_alpha and cost_weight added to complete the bandit's registration, BEFORE any bandit run existed; context features locked at (1, ewma, has_belief). (Amendment 6, same day, zero set-runs executed; registration CLOSED after this) model claude-haiku-4-5 -> Qwen/Qwen3-8B on vLLM (hypothesis is model-agnostic; cost/throughput), market-proxy prices $0.10/$0.30 per MTok with the haiku table as the sensitivity alternate; success-per-dollar reserved for dollar-spending agents and the full roster reported as a cost-vs-success Pareto (retrieve-only's $0 makes the ratio degenerate; the bandit-vs-heuristic criterion is untouched); relocations redrawn from a dedicated agent-independent RNG so goal sequences are PAIRED across agents per (regime, seed). CORRECTION 2026-07-14: Amendment 6a as originally committed misnamed the model as Qwen/Qwen3-8B; the deployed, calibration-probed, and intended substrate is Qwen/Qwen3-4B (calm-state probe: rate 0.024, 95% CI [0.012, 0.038], GREEN — run before any experiment-set run). Zero set-runs executed; hashes final from the correction commit (see docs/CLAUDE.md Amendment 6 Correction). AMENDMENT 8 (2026-07-15, zero set-runs executed): substrate -> Qwen/Qwen3-8B served via OpenRouter (provider pinned to Alibaba, temperature 0, seed 0, reasoning disabled). The 4B substrate was lost operationally (Vast endpoint death/recreation; 4B delisted from managed serving); 8B selected by cost-benefit over the OpenRouter catalog (free tiers excluded by rate-limit math) as the family-minimal step. Prices become the REAL per-token prices of the chosen serving path per Design decision 1 ($0.117/$0.455 per MTok); haiku table remains the sensitivity alternate. guided_regex is unavailable on OpenRouter - format robustness rests on the parser + fallback (measured benign). Calibration probe re-run against this config and cited in docs/CLAUDE.md Amendment 8. Hashes final from the Amendment 8 commit, superseding prior finality claims.

regimes.name: easy-7
regimes.note: Small grid, sharp probes, two mild shifts. The regime the smoke runs lived in; kept as the floor of the difficulty spread.

regimes.name: mid-11
regimes.note: Middle of the road: bigger search space, moderate relocations.

regimes.name: hard-15-far
regimes.note: Large grid, large relocations: stale beliefs are maximally misleading and re-exploration is expensive.

regimes.name: hard-11-blunt-probe
regimes.note: Evidence is costly: probe radius 1 means gather_evidence needs many steps to pay off, stressing the spend-on-evidence tradeoff.

regimes.name: turbulent-11
regimes.note: Frequent alternating shifts: recalibration never gets to settle, stressing recovery speed rather than one-off adaptation.
